header.description: Create and edit data in Pipedrive

add.description: Add a product to a deal

remove.description: Remove a product from a deal

subject.description: The subject of the activity to create

done.description: Whether the activity is done or not

type.description: Type of the activity like "call", "meeting", etc

deal_id.description: ID of the deal this note will be associated with

due_date.description: Due Date to activity be done YYYY-MM-DD

org_id.description: ID of the organization this deal will be associated with. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

person_id.description: ID of the person this note will be associated with

user_id.description: The ID of the User whose Activities will be fetched. If omitted, the User associated with the API token will be used. If 0, Activities for all company Users will be fetched based on the permission sets. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

customProperties.description: Adds a custom property to set also values which have not been predefined

name.description: Name of the custom field to set. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

value.description: Value of the property to set

name.description: Name of the custom field to set. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

value.description: Value of the property to set

currency.description: Currency of the deal. Accepts a 3-character currency code. Like EUR, USD, ...

label.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

lost_reason.description: Reason why the deal was lost

stage_id.description: ID of the stage this deal will be placed in a pipeline. If omitted, the deal will be placed in the first stage of the default pipeline. (PIPELINE > STAGE). Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

status.description: The status of the deal. If not provided it will automatically be set to "open".

value.description: Potential monetary value associated with the lead

visible_to.description: Visibility of the person. If omitted, visibility will be set to the default visibility setting of this item type for the authorized user.

comments.description: Text to describe this product-deal attachment

product_variation_id.description: ID of the product variation to use

includeFields.description: Supports including optional fields in the results which are not provided by default

organizationId.description: Will filter Deals by the provided Organization ID

personId.description: Will filter Deals by the provided Person ID

fields.description: A comma-separated string array. The fields to perform the search from. Defaults to all of them.

activity_id.description: ID of the activite this file will be associated with

product_id.description: ID of the person this file will be associated with

expected_close_date.description: Date when the lead’s deal is expected to be closed, in ISO-8601 format

label_ids.description: ID of the labels to attach to the lead to create. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

organization_id.description: ID of the organization to link to this lead

owner_id.description: ID of the User this deal will be associated with. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

exactMatch.description: Whether only full exact matches against the given term are returned. It is not case sensitive.

rawData.description: Whether to return the data exactly in the way it got received from the API

marketing_status.description: Please be aware that it is only allowed once to change the marketing status from an old status to a new one

done.description: Whether the Activity is done or not. 0 = Not done, 1 = Done. If omitted returns both Done and Not done activities.

exclude.description: A comma-separated Activity IDs, to exclude from result. Ex. 4, 9, 11, ...

filterId.description: The ID of the Filter to use (will narrow down results if used together with user_id parameter). Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

firstChar.description: If supplied, only persons whose name starts with the specified letter will be returned

sort.description: The field names and sorting mode separated by a comma (field_name_1 ASC, field_name_2 DESC). Only first-level field keys are supported (no nested keys).

lead_id.description: ID of the lead this note will be associated with

end_date.description: Use the Activity due date where you wish to stop fetching Activities from. Insert due date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

start_date.description: Use the Activity due date where you wish to begin fetching Activities from. Insert due date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

type.description: Type of the Activity. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

activityId.description: ID of the activity to update

busy_flag.description: Whether the user is set to busy during the activity

deal_id.description: ID of the deal this note will be associated with

due_date.description: Due Date to activity be done YYYY-MM-DD

done.description: Whether the activity is done or not

org_id.description: ID of the organization this deal will be associated with. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

person_id.description: ID of the person this note will be associated with

public_description.description: Additional details about the activity that is synced to your external calendar

type.description: Type of the activity like "call", "meeting", etc

user_id.description: ID of the active user whom the activity will be assigned to. If omitted, the activity will be assigned to the authorized user. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

customProperties.description: Adds a custom property to set also values which have not been predefined

name.description: Name of the custom field to set. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

value.description: Value of the property to set

name.description: Name of the custom field to set. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

value.description: Value of the property to set

currency.description: Currency of the deal. Accepts a 3-character currency code. Like EUR, USD, ...

label.description: Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression

lost_reason.description: Reason why the deal was lost

stage_id.description: ID of the stage this deal will be placed in a pipeline. If omitted, the deal will be placed in the first stage of the default pipeline. (PIPELINE > STAGE). Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

status.description: The status of the deal. If not provided it will automatically be set to "open".

title.description: Name of the lead to update

value.description: Potential monetary value associated with the lead

visible_to.description: Visibility of the deal. If omitted, visibility will be set to the default visibility setting of this item type for the authorized user.

comments.description: Text to describe this product-deal attachment

item_price.description: Price at which to add or update this product in a deal

quantity.description: How many items of this product to add/update in a deal

product_variation_id.description: ID of the product variation to use

description.description: The updated description of the file

owner_id.description: ID of the User this person will be associated with. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

label_ids.description: ID of the labels to attach to the lead to update. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

expected_close_date.description: Date when the lead’s deal is expected to be closed, in ISO-8601 format

lead_id.description: ID of the lead this note will be associated with

marketing_status.description: Please be aware that it is only allowed once to change the marketing status from an old status to a new one

title.description: Name of the lead to create

associateWith.description: Type of entity to link to this lead

org_id.description: ID of the organization this deal will be associated with

person_id.description: ID of the person to link to this lead

dealId.description: The ID of the deal whose activity to retrieve. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

productId.description: The ID of the product to add to a deal. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

item_price.description: Price at which to add or update this product in a deal

quantity.description: How many items of this product to add/update in a deal

productAttachmentId.description: ID of the deal-product (the ID of the product attached to the deal). Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

term.description: The search term to look for. Minimum 2 characters (or 1 if using exact_match).

exactMatch.description: Whether only full exact matches against the given term are returned. It is not case sensitive.

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

fileId.description: ID of the file to update

organization_id.description: ID of the organization to link to this lead

leadId.description: ID of the lead to update

content.description: The content of the note to create

noteId.description: ID of the note to update

name.description: The name of the person to create

organizationId.description: The ID of the organization to create

personId.description: ID of the person to update

resolveProperties.description: By default do custom properties get returned only as ID instead of their actual name. Also option fields contain only the ID instead of their actual value. If this option gets set they get automatically resolved.

encodeProperties.description: By default do custom properties have to be set as ID instead of their actual name. Also option fields have to be set as ID instead of their actual value. If this option gets set they get automatically encoded.

firstChar.description: If supplied, only organizations whose name starts with the specified letter will be returned

filterId.description: ID of the filter to use. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

filter_id.description: Predefined filter to apply to the deals to retrieve. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

stage_id.description: ID of the stage to filter deals by. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

status.description: Status to filter deals by. Defaults to all_not_deleted

user_id.description: ID of the user to filter deals by. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.
